title: For the Love of Scraps
excerpt: When I get into a cleaning frenzy, there is no stopping me. Though it happens rarely, I have found the most efficient way to clean the table is to also create something at the same time. I find scraps that…
body:
When I get into a cleaning frenzy, there is no stopping me. Though it happens rarely, I have found the most efficient way to clean the table is to also create something at the same time. I find scraps that I can't bare throwing away, and I save them from the fate of the trash and find them a nice home on a page. Even the scrap from the tree cut on the Silhouette was rescued and became a focal point on this page. Whipped together using no photos and a Pebbles stamp set that I used for the first time, this layout documents the books I read last year.

Digging the fact that these bits and pieces didn't have to go into the recycling bin. More projects that I worked on simultaneously that I posted on Instagram:
